ucs.title: [LLM] INC Ransom (GOLD IONIC) network discovery → password-protected archive staging
ucs.description: Hunts INC Ransom's pre-encryption playbook: NETSCAN / Advanced IP Scanner / SoftPerfect run by an interactive user, followed within hours by 7-Zip / WinRAR archive creation with password and split-volume flags on the same host — the canonical INC Ransom (Storm-0501 affiliate) staging pattern that precedes MEGAsync/Rclone exfil and bin deployment.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("netscan.exe","netscanpro.exe","advanced_ip_scanner.exe","softperfectnetworkscanner.exe","angryip.exe","ipscan.exe") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("7z.exe","7za.exe","7zg.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe") AND Processes.process="* a *" AND (Processes.process="*-p*" OR Processes.process="*-mx*" OR Processes.process="*-v*" OR Processes.process="*-r*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name _time span=6h | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval activity=case(match(process_name,"(?i)(netscan|advanced_ip_scanner|softperfect|angryip|ipscan)"),"discovery",match(process_name,"(?i)(7z|winrar|rar)"),"archive",1=1,"other") | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(process_name) as tools values(cmdlines) as cmdlines dc(activity) as phases by dest user _time | where phases>=2 | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort 0 - lastTime
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let StagingWindow = 6h;
let _scanners = dynamic(["netscan.exe","netscanpro.exe","advanced_ip_scanner.exe","softperfectnetworkscanner.exe","angryip.exe","ipscan.exe"]);
let _archivers = dynamic(["7z.exe","7za.exe","7zg.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe"]);
let Discovery = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ (_scanners)
    | project DiscTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              DiscoveryTool = FileName, DiscoveryCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where FileName in~ (_archivers)
| where ProcessCommandLine has " a "                          // archive add verb
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-p", "-mx", "-v", "-r")  // password / max compression / split / recurse
| join kind=inner Discovery on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (DiscTime .. DiscTime + StagingWindow)
| project DiscTime, ArchiveTime = Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          DiscoveryTool, DiscoveryCmd,
          ArchiveTool = FileName, ArchiveCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', Timestamp, DiscTime)
| order by ArchiveTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let StagingWindow = 6h;
let _scanners = dynamic(["netscan.exe","netscanpro.exe","advanced_ip_scanner.exe","softperfectnetworkscanner.exe","angryip.exe","ipscan.exe"]);
let _archivers = dynamic(["7z.exe","7za.exe","7zg.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe"]);
let Discovery = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend BinName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\\")[-1]))
    | where BinName in (_scanners)
    | project DiscTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              DiscoveryTool = BinName, DiscoveryCmd = CommandLine;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend BinName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\\")[-1]))
| where BinName in (_archivers)
| where CommandLine has " a "
| where CommandLine has_any ("-p", "-mx", "-v", "-r")
| join kind=inner Discovery on Computer
| where TimeGenerated between (DiscTime .. DiscTime + StagingWindow)
| project DiscTime, ArchiveTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          DiscoveryTool, DiscoveryCmd,
          ArchiveTool = BinName, ArchiveCmd = CommandLine,
          DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, DiscTime)
| order by ArchiveTime desc
ucs.rationale: INC Ransom / GOLD IONIC (Storm-0501 affiliate) is consistently observed running NETSCAN or Advanced IP Scanner from the initial-access host before staging victim data with 7-Zip/WinRAR (password-protected, split-volume) for MEGAsync/Rclone exfil — Mandiant, Microsoft, and SentinelOne all tag this exact toolset combo. Either tool alone is benign in many estates; the *time-windowed pairing on the sa

ucs.title: [LLM] INC Ransom NTDS.dit / LSASS credential extraction (esentutl VSS, comsvcs MiniDump, ntdsutil IFM)
ucs.description: Detects the three credential-access primitives INC Ransom routinely chains after gaining a privileged foothold: esentutl /y /vss against ntds.dit, rundll32 comsvcs.dll MiniDump against lsass, and ntdsutil 'ifm' full-snapshot — typically followed by AnyDesk / PsExec lateral spread before mass encryption.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ( (Processes.process_name="esentutl.exe" AND Processes.process="*/y*" AND Processes.process="*/vss*" AND Processes.process="*ntds*") OR (Processes.process_name="rundll32.exe" AND Processes.process="*comsvcs.dll*" AND Processes.process="*MiniDump*") OR (Processes.process_name="ntdsutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*ifm*") OR (Processes.process_name="ntdsutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*create full*") ) by Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval technique=case(match(process_name,"(?i)esentutl"),"T1003.003 esentutl-vss-ntds",match(process_name,"(?i)rundll32"),"T1003.001 comsvcs-minidump-lsass",match(process_name,"(?i)ntdsutil"),"T1003.003 ntdsutil-ifm") | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort 0 - lastTime
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "esentutl.exe"
          and ProcessCommandLine has "/y"
          and ProcessCommandLine has "/vss"
          and ProcessCommandLine has "ntds")
    or  (FileName =~ "rundll32.exe"
          and ProcessCommandLine has "comsvcs.dll"
          and ProcessCommandLine has "MiniDump")
    or  (FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe"
          and (ProcessCommandLine has "ifm"
               or ProcessCommandLine has_all ("ac in ntds", "create full")))
| extend Technique = case(
        FileName =~ "esentutl.exe",  "T1003.003 esentutl /y /vss ntds.dit",
        FileName =~ "rundll32.exe",  "T1003.001 comsvcs.dll MiniDump (LSASS)",
        FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe",  "T1003.003 ntdsutil IFM full",
        "unknown")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, Technique,
          FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentProcess = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessAccountName,
          InitiatingProcessIntegrityLevel,
          SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend BinName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\\")[-1]))
| where (BinName == "esentutl.exe"
          and CommandLine has "/y"
          and CommandLine has "/vss"
          and CommandLine has "ntds")
    or  (BinName == "rundll32.exe"
          and CommandLine has "comsvcs.dll"
          and CommandLine has "MiniDump")
    or  (BinName == "ntdsutil.exe"
          and (CommandLine has "ifm"
               or CommandLine has_all ("ac in ntds", "create full")))
| extend Technique = case(
        BinName == "esentutl.exe", "T1003.003 esentutl /y /vss ntds.dit",
        BinName == "rundll32.exe", "T1003.001 comsvcs.dll MiniDump (LSASS)",
        BinName == "ntdsutil.exe", "T1003.003 ntdsutil IFM full",
        "unknown")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, Technique,
          BinName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: INC Ransom NTDS and LSASS Credential Extraction
id: a3c9f2c4-5b8e-4a1d-9d2e-9f1ab2cde001
status: experimental
description: Detects esentutl /y /vss against ntds.dit, rundll32 comsvcs.dll MiniDump on LSASS, and ntdsutil IFM full-snapshot — credential-access tradecraft consistently observed in INC Ransom (GOLD IONIC / Storm-0501 affiliate) intrusions prior to lateral movement and ransomware deployment.
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1032/
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/storm-0501
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  esentutl_vss_ntds:
    Image|endswith: '\esentutl.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - '/y'
      - '/vss'
      - 'ntds'
  comsvcs_minidump:
    Image|endswith: '\rundll32.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'comsvcs.dll'
      - 'MiniDump'
  ntdsutil_ifm:
    Image|endswith: '\ntdsutil.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'ifm'
      - 'create full'
  condition: esentutl_vss_ntds or comsvcs_minidump or ntdsutil_ifm
falsepositives:
  - Authorised domain-controller backup using ntdsutil IFM (rare; should be pre-approved)
  - Microsoft support engagement for AD recovery
level: high
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.001
  - attack.t1003.003
  - attack.g1032
ucs.rationale: INC Ransom IR reports from Mandiant, SentinelOne and Microsoft (which tracks the affiliate as Storm-0501) repeatedly cite this exact triplet — `esentutl.exe /y /vss "%SYSTEMROOT%\NTDS\ntds.dit" /d ...`, `rundll32 C:\Windows\System32\comsvcs.dll, MiniDump <pid> ... full`, and `ntdsutil "ac in ntds" "ifm" "create full ..." q q` — used to harvest hybrid-AD credentials before pivoting to AnyDesk persi
